name: io.github.gitwormq/datasieve
description: Standing infrastructure for agents over x402: on-chain watches on Base, url-change web monitoring, dead-man switches, cron schedules, multi-agent coordination, signed receipts. No account — wallet is identity.

environmentVariables.name: DATASIEVE_PRIVATE_KEY_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Path to a file holding a burner wallet key (0x…) with USDC on Base. Optional — free tools work without it.

environmentVariables.name: DATASIEVE_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: API base URL. Default https://api.datasieve.xyz; sandbox https://staging.datasieve.xyz (Base Sepolia, faucet USDC).
